text.description: Single-line or multi-line text element. Supports data binding for dynamic content.

image.description: Static or dynamic image element. Supports jpg, png, svg, webp. Can bind to data field for dynamic image URLs.

rect.description: Rectangle shape. Can be used for borders, backgrounds, and decorative elements.

ellipse.description: Circle or ellipse shape. Can be used for decorative elements.

line.description: Horizontal or vertical line. Used for separators and borders.

qrcode.description: QR code generated from data binding. Encodes text or URLs from data source fields.

barcode.description: Barcode generated from data binding. Supports multiple barcode formats (CODE128, EAN13, etc.).

container.description: Container element that holds child elements. Used for grouping and layout.

table.description: Data-bound table with header, footer, and repeat-template data rows. Supports cell-level data binding.

page-number.description: Auto page number display. Shows current page and total pages.

svg.description: Inline SVG element for custom vector graphics.

rich-text.description: Rich text element supporting styled content with multiple formatting options.

chart.description: Chart element for data visualization. Supports bar, line, pie, and other chart types.

bindingRules.fieldPathFormat: Slash-separated path from data source root (e.g., 'items/name', 'company/address')
bindingRules.sourceIdFormat: References a DataSource by its id field

bindingTypes.description: Standard data binding on an element. Used for repeat-template table cells.
Static data binding on table header/footer cells. Single value, no collection expansion.

tableRules.repeatTemplateBinding: Repeat-template row cells use 'binding' field. All cells in same row must share same collection prefix (e.g., all items/* paths).
tableRules.staticBindingUsage: Header, footer, and normal row cells use 'staticBinding'. Each cell can bind to different data sources.
